title: FogShiftWEATHER
description: A dynamic fog weather system that occasionally covers the world with thick atmospheric mist.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a546d8c5d39f9106d5f698a91d5553f06ad459d.jpeg)

**FogShiftWEATHER** adds a new weather event to Minecraft: dense fog.

From time to time, the world can be covered by a thick layer of fog, reducing visibility and creating a mysterious atmosphere during exploration.

Unlike rain or thunderstorms, fog focuses purely on atmosphere and immersion, without changing gameplay balance.

## Features ⚒️

Dynamic fog weather
A new weather state where dense fog slowly appears across the world.

Reduced visibility
Players can only see a limited distance while the fog is active, creating tension during exploration.

Smooth transitions
The fog gradually fades in and fades out to keep the world feeling natural.

Lightweight design
The mod does not add new items, mobs, or blocks.
It only enhances the environmental atmosphere.

## Compatibility 💡

The mod works in:

Singleplayer
Multiplayer (if installed on the server)
Servers where the mod is present
